summary: Episode 13: Word of Tariq's star notes spread, and the traveler told of a distant city where a ruler gathered scholars to build a great observatory and chart a thousand stars. Inspired, Salim had Tariq share his observations with Noor's reading circle, who began copying his notes onto fresh pages by lamplight. Tariq learned that great knowledge is built by many patient hands, not one lonely watcher. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door
Tariq's star observations are now being copied and shared by the reading circle
The traveler keeps sharing tales of distant cities and their wonders
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing
